gui.botc-mc.grimoire.title: Map
gui.botc-mc.unseated_warning: Ye don't have a cabin assigned!
character.botc-mc.acrobat.ability: Ev'ry moon*, pick a matey: if'n they be or get tipsy or seasick this moon, ye be joining the Locker.
character.botc-mc.acrobat.flavor: Arr, welcome, me hearties, to the greatest show on the seven seas.
character.botc-mc.acrobat.name: Acrobat
character.botc-mc.alchemist.ability: Ye work a Scallywag trade. If'n ye use it, the Captain might tell ye to pick som'n else.
character.botc-mc.alchemist.first: Show the *YE BE* mark and the station mark of a Scallywag.
character.botc-mc.alchemist.flavor: See the interior o' the Earth. By rectification thou shalt find the hidden stone. Above the gold, lieth the red. Kether in Malkuth.
character.botc-mc.alchemist.name: Alchemist
character.botc-mc.alhadikhia.ability: Ev'ry moon*, ye can pick 3 mateys (all mateys be told who): they silent-like pick to live or join the locker, but if all live, all join the locker.
character.botc-mc.alhadikhia.name: Al-Hadikhia
character.botc-mc.alhadikhia.other: Al-Hadikhia picks three mateys. :reminder: :reminder: :reminder: Rouse the mateys marked *1* and proclaim, "Al-Hadikhia has picked" then the matey's name, then "do ye pick to live?". They either nod or shake their noggin. Send 'em to slumber and add or take coffins as needs be. Do it again for players marked *2* and *3*. If all three now be livin', add a coffin to all three.
character.botc-mc.alsaahir.ability: Ev'ry sun, if'n you figure out on the deck whose the Scallywag(s) and whose the Beast(s) o' the sea, the good'uns prevail.
character.botc-mc.alsaahir.flavor: I be here because of ye, and ye be here beacause of me.
character.botc-mc.alsaahir.name: Alsaahir
character.botc-mc.amnesiac.ability: Ye forgot what yer trade be. Ev'ry sun, tell the Captain privately what it is: learn how right ye be.
character.botc-mc.amnesiac.first: Needs be, work the Woolgatherer's trade.
character.botc-mc.amnesiac.flavor: Wait. What. Who? Arr. Wait. What?
character.botc-mc.amnesiac.name: Woolgatherer
character.botc-mc.amnesiac.other: Needs be, work the Woolgatherer's trade.
character.botc-mc.angel.ability: Something mayhaps goes wrong for whoever is most to blame for sending a greenhorn to the locker.
character.botc-mc.angel.first: Proclaim which mateys be protected by the Angel. Add the *PROTECTED*mark to those mateys.
character.botc-mc.angel.flavor: Let those who are without sin dare to raise their hand to my chosen, for I shall strike such fools down with the fury and righteousness of a thousand storms.
character.botc-mc.angel.name: Angel
character.botc-mc.apprentice.ability: Under yer 1st moon, ye start working a Crewmate trade (if'n ye be good) or a Scallywag trade (if'n ye be bad).
character.botc-mc.apprentice.first: Show the Apprentice the *YE BE* mark, then a Crewmate or Scallywag mark. In the map, give them the Apprentice mark with their station mark, and put the Apprentice's *BE THE APPRENTICE* mark by their station mark.
character.botc-mc.apprentice.flavor: For many moons I've learnt from the best, working my trade. Which trade? Just that o' the humble soul. No need for alarm. Not yet.
character.botc-mc.apprentice.name: Apprentice
character.botc-mc.artist.ability: Once a journey, in the daylight, ask the Captain alone any Yarr/Nar question.
character.botc-mc.artist.flavor: Ne'er have I seen aught so beautiful as the open ocean. I must capture it.
character.botc-mc.artist.name: Painter
character.botc-mc.assassin.ability: Once in yer journey, under the moon*, pick a matey: they join the locker, even if'n they shouldn'.
character.botc-mc.assassin.name: Assassin
character.botc-mc.assassin.other: The assassin can pick a matey. :reminder: :reminder:
character.botc-mc.atheist.ability: The Captain dont need'n follow the statutes, and if made to walk the plank, the good'uns prevail, even if'n yer in the locker. [No ne'erdowells]
character.botc-mc.atheist.flavor: Let us speak naught o' the faiths of the old crowns. Their gods have no place on the open sea. Waves and storms be natural phenomena. Weather be weather, the human mind be the human mind... and a story be but a story.
character.botc-mc.atheist.name: Skeptic
character.botc-mc.balloonist.ability: Ev'ry moon, ye learn a matey of a different station rank to the last. [+0 or +1 Stowaway]
character.botc-mc.balloonist.flavor: The view from the crow's nest be beautiful don't ye think? Look out to sea. Do ye see the merchants hard to starboard? A ship o' the crown on the horizon? Now below. See the lads scrubbing the deck, now the first mate ready to skirmish. Ship ahoy!
character.botc-mc.balloonist.name: Lookout
character.botc-mc.balloonist.other: Show a matey of a different station rank to last moon. :reminder:
character.botc-mc.banshee.ability: If'n the Beast o' the sea sends ye to the locker, all mateys know it. Then, ye can accuse twice each sun and say aye twice per accusal.
character.botc-mc.banshee.flavor: Glas ow holow, rudh ow blewennow, ny vydh hemma hir, a vydhys yn gollow.
character.botc-mc.banshee.name: Death-Knocker
character.botc-mc.banshee.other: If'n the Death-Knocker be sent to the locker by the Beast o' the Sea this moon, tell all mateys that the Death-Knocker were sent to the locker. :reminder:
character.botc-mc.barber.ability: If'n ye died under last daylight or this moon, the Beast o' the Sea can pick 2 mateys (not another Beast o' the Sea) to swap stations.
character.botc-mc.barber.flavor: What can I interest ye in today? A bit off the sides, a lot off the top? Oh, just your hair? Oh, well.
character.botc-mc.barber.name: Barber
character.botc-mc.barber.other: If'n the Barber died under last daylight or this moon, show the Beast o' the Sea the *THIS STATION PICKED YE* & Barber marks. If'n the Beast o' the Sea picks 2 mateys, rouse each, one by one. Show the *YE BE* mark & their new station marks.
character.botc-mc.barista.ability: Ev'ry moon, until sun down, 1) a matey becomes decent, whole, and gets right knowin's, or 2) they work their trade twice. They learn which.
character.botc-mc.barista.first: Pick a matey, rouse them and tell them which Alewife trade be worked on them. Do as ye picked (give them right knowin's and make their trade decent and whole, or work their trade twice).
character.botc-mc.barista.flavor: We've been workin' on a new blend, lads. Lots of sugar. This might give ye a bit of a buzz.
character.botc-mc.barista.name: Alewife
character.botc-mc.barista.other: Pick a matey, rouse them and tell them which Alewife trade be worked on them. Do as ye picked (give them right knowin's and make their trade decent and whole, or work their trade twice).
character.botc-mc.baron.ability: Thar be extra stowaways aboard [+2 stowaways]
character.botc-mc.baron.flavor: When is that Old World ship getting in? His Majesty is sending some... undesirables. Criminals. But we'll find a way to make them productive, no doubt. And we'll sort them out along the way.
character.botc-mc.baron.name: Landlord
character.botc-mc.beggar.ability: Ye have to spend a dead man's treasure to vote. If a matey in the locker gives ye theirs, ye be told their loyalty. Ye be decent and whole.
character.botc-mc.beggar.flavor: Alms for the poor, good Sir? Spare a coin, Madam? Thank ye kindly. God bless! Yer a right kind soul and no mistake! I'll have some swanky nosh tonight, I will!
character.botc-mc.beggar.name: Beggar
character.botc-mc.bigwig.ability: Every accused matey picks a matey: until ayes, only they can talk & they be me addled that the accused be a good'un or they join the locker, mayhaps.
character.botc-mc.bigwig.flavor: Vanity asks ‘Is it popular?’ Cowardice asks ‘Is it safe?’ Conscience asks ‘Is it good?’ Who among us will ask: ‘Is it true?’
character.botc-mc.bigwig.name: Fancy Coat
character.botc-mc.bishop.ability: Only the Captain can accuse. At least 1 matey with a different loyalty to ye must be accused each daylight.
character.botc-mc.bishop.flavor: In nomine Patris, et Filii, et Spiritus Sancti… Nos mos Dei. Deus vult de nobis.
character.botc-mc.bishop.name: Bishop
character.botc-mc.boffin.ability: The Beast o' the Sea (even when tipsy or seasick) works a not-aboard deckhand's trade. Ye both be knowin' which.
character.botc-mc.boffin.first: Rouse the Gear Wright and the Beast o' the Sea. Show the ashore deckhand mark. Send the Gear Wright and the Beast o' the Sea to slumber.
character.botc-mc.boffin.flavor: The enemy are forever stuck in the last century. Let us build something new. Prithee, file the teeth evenly, lest the motion falter. Align the pinion with the mainshaft. If the gear bites not, the engine serves no man.
character.botc-mc.boffin.name: Gear Wright
character.botc-mc.bonecollector.ability: Once on yer journey, under the moon*, pick a matey in the locker: they work their trade again until sun down.
character.botc-mc.bonecollector.flavor: I collect many things. Hair. Teeth. Clothes. Fragments of poems. The dreams of lost lovers. My secret arts are not for thou to know but my fee is a mere pittance. Bring'st me the blood of a noblewoman who died of heartbreak under a full moon, and thou shalt have thy answers.
character.botc-mc.bonecollector.name: Bone Collector
character.botc-mc.bonecollector.other: The Bone Collector shakes their noggin 'nay' or picks a matey in the locker. If'n they picked a matey, put the Bone Collector's 'Works Trade' memberin' mark by the picked matey's station mark. (Ye may need to rouse the matey to work their trade.)
character.botc-mc.boomdandy.ability: If ye walk the plank, all but 3 mateys join the locker. After a 10 to 1 countdown, the matey with the most mateys pointing at them joins the locker.
character.botc-mc.boomdandy.name: Boomdandy
character.botc-mc.bootlegger.ability: This ledger has counterfeit stations or statutes.
character.botc-mc.bootlegger.flavor: My first crew called me 'Homebrewy McHomebrewface'. But the Admirals care naught for our little democracies.
character.botc-mc.bootlegger.name: Bootlegger
character.botc-mc.bountyhunter.ability: Ye join knowing 1 bad'un. If the matey ye know joins the locker, ye be told another bad'un next moon. [1 Crewmate be a bad'un]
character.botc-mc.bountyhunter.flavor: Alone, I walk these streets, paved with the sick stench of corruption. Its thickness worms its way into my nostrils, unbidden, burning with revulsion. And anticipation. The illness of this wretched place grows each night. And I... I am the cure.
character.botc-mc.bountyhunter.name: Bounty Hunter
character.botc-mc.bountyhunter.other: If the *KNOWN* matey joined the locker under last daylight or this moon, show a new *KNOWN* matey.
character.botc-mc.buddhist.ability: For the first 2 moments of each daylight, sea dogs hold their tongues.
character.botc-mc.buddhist.first: Proclaim the mateys affected by the Buddhist.
character.botc-mc.buddhist.flavor: You throw thorns. Falling in my silence, they become flowers.
character.botc-mc.buddhist.name: Buddhist
character.botc-mc.bureaucrat.ability: Ev'ry moon, pick a matey (not yerself): if they say aye in the morrow, it counts for 3.
character.botc-mc.bureaucrat.flavor: Please mark the document here. And here. And here. And one more here, for luck. Thank you. We'll file this with the appropriate minister, and send a merchant out to you within the year. Now, what was it? One thousand cannonballs? Yes, of course.
character.botc-mc.bureaucrat.name: Clerk
character.botc-mc.butcher.ability: Ev'ry daylight, after a player walks the plank, ye can accuse again.
character.botc-mc.butcher.flavor: Looks like meat's back on the menu, boys. Don't worry about what happened to Polly.
character.botc-mc.butcher.name: Butcher
character.botc-mc.butler.ability: Ev'ry moon, pick a matey (not yerself): in the morrow, ye can say aye only if they do, too.
character.botc-mc.butler.first: The Cabin Boy picks a matey :reminder:
character.botc-mc.butler.flavor: Aye, sir. Nay, sir... yes, captain.
character.botc-mc.butler.name: Cabin Boy
character.botc-mc.butler.other: The Cabin Boy picks a matey. :reminder:
character.botc-mc.cannibal.ability: Ye work the trade of the most recent matey to have joined the locker by walkin' the plank. If they be a bad'un, ye be seasick until a good'un joins the locker by walkin' the plank.
character.botc-mc.cannibal.flavor: I don’t like clowns. They taste funny.
character.botc-mc.cannibal.name: Cannibal
character.botc-mc.cerenovus.ability: Ev'ry moon, pick a matey & a deckhand: they be "addled" that they be working this station in the morrow, or mayhaps walk the plank.
character.botc-mc.cerenovus.first: The Cerenovus picks a matey & a station. :reminder: Send the Cerenovus to slumber. Rouse the pick. Show the *THIS STATION PICKED YE* mark, the Cerenovus mark, then the addled-station mark.
character.botc-mc.cerenovus.flavor: Reality be merely an opinion. Specifically, my opinion.
character.botc-mc.cerenovus.name: Cerenovus
character.botc-mc.cerenovus.other: The Cerenovus picks a matey & a station. :reminder: Send the Cerenovus to slumber. Rouse the pick. Show the *THIS STATION PICKED YE* mark, the Cerenovus mark, then the addled-station mark.
character.botc-mc.chambermaid.ability: Ev'ry moon, pick 2 livin' mateys (but not you): ye be told how many were roused this moon thanks to their trade.
character.botc-mc.chambermaid.first: The Maid picks 2 livin' mateys. Make a gesture with yer fingers.
character.botc-mc.chambermaid.flavor: I aint seen nothin' untoward, Milady. Begging your pardon, but if I did see somethin', it certainly weren't the quartermaster sneaking into the surgeon's cabin 'round high moon and mixing up fancy potions, just like you said, Miss.
character.botc-mc.chambermaid.name: Maid
character.botc-mc.chambermaid.other: The Maid picks 2 livin' mateys. Make a gesture with yer fingers.
character.botc-mc.chef.ability: Ye join knowin' how many pairs of wrong'uns there be.
character.botc-mc.chef.first: Make a gesture with yer fingers.
character.botc-mc.chef.flavor: How peculiar. The bunkmates in the third cabin didn't want their rations today. The second cabin swear they heard them sneaking out fishing in the middle of the night. They've developed a taste for their own food.
character.botc-mc.chef.name: Cook
character.botc-mc.choirboy.ability: If'n the Beast o' the Sea sends the King to the locker, ye be told which matey be the Beast o' the Sea. [+the King]
character.botc-mc.choirboy.flavor: I saw it, I did. I was in the pews, tidying the hymn books, when a dreadful tune started from the pipe organ. The organist had a long cloak, and long fingers on the keys. And a hat that looked… just like… yours.
character.botc-mc.choirboy.name: Choirboy
character.botc-mc.choirboy.other: If'n the Beast o' the Sea sent the King to the locker, point at the Beast o' the Sea.
character.botc-mc.clockmaker.ability: Ye join knowin' how many steps from the Beast o' the Sea to the nearest Scallywag.
character.botc-mc.clockmaker.first: Make a gesture with yer fingers.
character.botc-mc.clockmaker.flavor: I've found a new way to measure the passing of time like ne'er before. It took four turns of the hourglass between the start and the end of the disturbance last moon. We all know what that means.
character.botc-mc.clockmaker.name: Timekeeper
character.botc-mc.courtier.ability: Once on yer journey, under the moon, pick a station: they be tipsy for 3 moons and 3 suns.
character.botc-mc.courtier.first: The Attendant can pick a station. :reminder: :reminder:
character.botc-mc.courtier.flavor: Can I offer thee a drink, sir? Don't mind the taste. We only have seawater around here, after all.
character.botc-mc.courtier.name: Attendant
character.botc-mc.courtier.other: The Attendant can pick a station. :reminder: :reminder:
character.botc-mc.cultleader.ability: Ev'ry moon, ye turn the loyalty of a livin' bunkmate. If all good'uns join yer cult, ye prevail.
character.botc-mc.cultleader.first: The Cult Leader mayhaps turns loyalty. If so, show the *YE BE* mark and a thumbs up or down for their new loyalty.
character.botc-mc.cultleader.flavor: Thinking themselves wise, they became fools.
character.botc-mc.cultleader.name: Cult Leader
character.botc-mc.cultleader.other: The Cult Leader mayhaps turns loyalty. If so, show the *YE BE* mark and a thumbs up or down for their new loyalty.
character.botc-mc.damsel.ability: All Scallywags be told the Quarry be aboard. If'n a Scallywag guesses ye on deck (once), yer crew sinks.
character.botc-mc.damsel.first: If'n the Quarry were picked by the Tracker, show them the *YE BE* mark and their new station mark.
character.botc-mc.damsel.name: Quarry
character.botc-mc.damsel.other: If'n the Quarry were picked by the Tracker, show them the *YE BE* mark and their new station mark.
character.botc-mc.dawn.first: Pause for a few blinks. Rouse the crew.
character.botc-mc.dawn.name: Sun Up
character.botc-mc.dawn.other: Pause for a few blinks. Rouse the crew.
character.botc-mc.demoninfo.first: If'n there be 7 or more mateys, rouse the Beast o' the Sea: show the *THESE BE YER SCALLYWAGS* mark. Point at the Scallywags. Show the *THESE STATIONS BE ASHORE* mark. Show 3 ashore Deckhand marks.
character.botc-mc.demoninfo.name: Beastly Knowin's
character.botc-mc.deusexfiasco.ability: At least once in yer journey, the Captain will blunder, fix it, and admit to it on deck.
character.botc-mc.deusexfiasco.flavor: We put a lot of trust in our Captain to guide us through stormy seas. Sometimes, they've been on the sherry.
character.botc-mc.deusexfiasco.name: Captain's Folly
character.botc-mc.deviant.ability: If ye were funny during this daylight, ye don't join the locker if ye be set off to sea.
character.botc-mc.deviant.flavor: What's a pirate's favourite letter? Sea! No, Arr!
character.botc-mc.deviant.name: Deviant
character.botc-mc.devilsadvocate.ability: Ev'ry moon, pick a livin' matey (that ye didn't pick last moon): if'n they walk the plank in the next daylight, they don't join the locker.
character.botc-mc.devilsadvocate.first: The Devil's Advocate picks a livin' matey. :reminder:
character.botc-mc.devilsadvocate.flavor: The Pirate Code CLEARLY states that no person shall... be punished... for any crime... without the agreed permission of the Captain. Regrettably, as the Captain was recently eaten by a sea monster, said monster cannot be held responsible for its actions, ipse facto, we must all adjourn to our cabins and talk about this more tomorrow.
character.botc-mc.devilsadvocate.name: Devil's Advocate
character.botc-mc.devilsadvocate.other: The Devil's Advocate picks a livin' matey. :reminder:
character.botc-mc.djinn.ability: Use the Genie's statutes. All mateys know what they be.
character.botc-mc.djinn.flavor: نحن لسنا هنا. انت لست حقيقي. كل شيء هو وهم. أسئلتك هي جبل نار في يوم صافٍ.
character.botc-mc.djinn.name: Genie
character.botc-mc.doomsayer.ability: If'n there be 4 or more livin' mateys, once in the journey, each livin' matey can make a matey of their own loyalty join the locker when on deck.
character.botc-mc.doomsayer.flavor: Great Poseidon himself has sent storm and death! We must throw ourselves of to lighten the load! And, lo! The seventh seal is shattered! I suppose it deserves a rest.
character.botc-mc.doomsayer.name: Doomsayer
character.botc-mc.dreamer.ability: Ev'ry moon, pick a player (not yerself or Landlubbers): ye be told 1 deckhand & 1 ne'erdowell, 1 o' which they be.
character.botc-mc.dreamer.first: The Mooncalf picks a matey. Show 'em 1 deckhand & one ne'erdowell mark, 1 of which be their station.
character.botc-mc.dreamer.flavor: I always thought ye'd take well to the arts. I can imagine ye wi' a paintbrush, painting a beautiful picture of the blood red sea. Ye didn't have to use real blood, though.
character.botc-mc.dreamer.name: Mooncalf
character.botc-mc.dreamer.other: The Mooncalf picks a matey. Show 'em 1 deckhand & one ne'erdowell mark, 1 of which be their station.
character.botc-mc.drunk.ability: Ye don't know ye be the Drunkard. Ye tink ye be a Crewmate, but yer not.
character.botc-mc.drunk.flavor: The best part o' saiWhling be all the rum. The worst, be all the grog. But I'd not change it fer a moment. Way, hey, and up she rises!
character.botc-mc.drunk.name: Drunkard
character.botc-mc.duchess.ability: Ev'ry sun, 3 mateys can visit ye. Under the next moon, each o' them be told how many be bad'uns, but 1 gets scurvy.
character.botc-mc.duchess.flavor: We have a luncheon with Governor Torres at 2 precisely. Do not be late. Formal wear applies, as always.
character.botc-mc.duchess.name: Duchess
character.botc-mc.duchess.other: Rouse each matey marked *VISITOR* or *SCURVEY* one at a time. Show them the Duchess token, then fingers (1, 2, 3), one for each bad'un marked “Visitor” or, if you are waking the player marked “Scurvey,” show them any number o' fingers except the number o' bad'uns marked “Visitor.”
character.botc-mc.dusk.name: Sun Down
character.botc-mc.empath.ability: Ev'ry moon, ye be told how many o' your 2 livin' bunkmates be bad'uns.
character.botc-mc.empath.first: Make a gesture with yer fingers.
character.botc-mc.empath.flavor: Something be off with me new bunkmate. I think it be horns and the glowin' eyes.
character.botc-mc.empath.name: Sensitive
character.botc-mc.empath.other: Make a gesture with yer fingers.
character.botc-mc.engineer.ability: Once in yer journey, under the moon, pick which Scallywags or which Beast o' the Sea be aboard.
character.botc-mc.engineer.first: The Gear Wright mayhap picks Scallywags or Beasts o' the Sea. :reminder: If'n they do, send the Shipwright to slumber. Rouse a target, show them the *YOU ARE* mark and their new station mark, then send them to slumber. Do this fer all mateys that changed stations.
character.botc-mc.engineer.flavor: If'n she bends, she holds - if'n she snaps, well, she were askin’ to be replaced anyway.
character.botc-mc.engineer.name: Shipwright
character.botc-mc.engineer.other: The Shipwright mayhap picks Scallywags or Beasts o' the Sea. :reminder: If'n they do, send the Shipwright to slumber. Rouse a target, show them the *YOU ARE* mark and their new station mark, then send them to slumber. Do this fer all mateys that changed stations.
character.botc-mc.eviltwin.ability: Ye & a matey of the other loyalty know one another. If'n the good'un among ye walks the plank. The bad'uns prevail. The good'uns can't prevail if ye both live.
character.botc-mc.eviltwin.first: Rouse the Fetch and a good'un. Let them lock eyes. Show each's station mark to the other.
character.botc-mc.eviltwin.flavor: Tá an scáth tithe. Déanta an cinneadh, ní féidir é a athrú. Feicim thú, aithne agam ort; agus lá éigin, beithfidh mé tusa.
character.botc-mc.eviltwin.name: Fetch
character.botc-mc.exorcist.ability: Ev'ry moon*, pick a matey (not the same as last moon): the Beast o' the Sea, if picked, be told who ye be, then isn't roused this moon.
character.botc-mc.exorcist.flavor: We cast you out, every unclean spirit, every satanic power, every onslaught of the infernal adversary, every legion, every diabolical group and sect, in the name and by the power of Our Lord Jesus Christ. We command you, begone and fly far from the Church of God, from the souls made by God in His image and redeemed by the precious blood of the divine Lamb.
character.botc-mc.exorcist.name: Chaplain
character.botc-mc.exorcist.other: The Chaplain picks a matey. :reminder: Send the Chaplain to slumber. If'n the Chaplain picked the Beast o' the Sea: rouse the Beast o' the Sea. Show the *THIS MATEY PICKED YE* & Chaplain marks. Point at the Chaplain.
character.botc-mc.fanggu.ability: Ev'ry moon*, pick a matey: the join the locker. the first Stowaway this sends to the locker becomes a bad Fang Gu and ye join the locker instead. [+1 Stowaway]
character.botc-mc.fanggu.flavor: Yer cannons and yer hull be naught but smoke on the water.
character.botc-mc.fanggu.name: Fang Gu
character.botc-mc.fanggu.other: The Fang Gu picks a matey. :reminder: If they picked a Stowaway (once only): give the Stowaway the spare Fang Gu mark. Send the Fang Gu to slumber. Rouse the pick. Show the *YE BE* and Fang Gu marks and give a thumbs-down. :reminder:
character.botc-mc.farmer.ability: If'n ye join the locker under the moon, a livin' good matey becomes a Fisher.
character.botc-mc.farmer.flavor: When we be runnin' out o' hard tack, ye'll turn to us. Even the Cap'n needs to eat.
character.botc-mc.farmer.name: Fisher
character.botc-mc.farmer.other: If'n the Fisher died under this moon, rouse a livin' good'un. Show 'em the *YE BE* mark and a Fisher station mark. Replace their first mark wi' the Fisher mark.
character.botc-mc.fearmonger.ability: Ev'ry moon, pick a matey: if'n ye accuse them and they walk the plank, their crew sinks. All players know if ye picked a new matey.
character.botc-mc.fearmonger.first: The Fearmonger picks a matey. :reminder: Proclaim that "the Fearmonger has picked a matey."
character.botc-mc.fearmonger.flavor: All alone, out at sea. Anything could go wrong. And you'll turn on each other.
character.botc-mc.fearmonger.name: Fearmonger
character.botc-mc.fearmonger.other: The Fearmonger picks a matey. :reminder: If'n the matey didn't already have the *FEAR* 'memberin mark, proclaim that "the Fearmonger has picked a matey."
character.botc-mc.ferryman.ability: All mateys in the locker regain their dead man's treasure when approaching port.
character.botc-mc.ferryman.flavor: When righteous dreams come, they have the weight of truth.
character.botc-mc.ferryman.name: Ferryman
character.botc-mc.fibbin.ability: Once in the journey, 1 good'un mayhaps gets wrong knowin's.
character.botc-mc.fibbin.name: Fibbin
character.botc-mc.fiddler.ability: Once in the journey, the Beast o' the Sea below deck picks a foe: all mateys pick which o' the 2 mateys prevails.
character.botc-mc.fiddler.flavor: I'll wager mi lyef ye cannae best me in a fiddle contest, ye boss-eyed snook! We'll go out on the lash, get the pub jammers an' have a right craic. I'll be layin' ma boots into ya come mornin' ye rumbly muppet.
character.botc-mc.fiddler.name: Fiddler
character.botc-mc.fisherman.ability: Once on yer journey, in daylight, see the Captain for some guidance to help yer crew prevail.
character.botc-mc.fisherman.flavor: Red sky at morning, sailors take warning. Red sky at night, sailors delight.
character.botc-mc.fisherman.name: Old Salt
character.botc-mc.flowergirl.ability: Ev'ry moon*, ye be told if'n a Beast o' the Sea said aye under the last sunlight.
character.botc-mc.flowergirl.flavor: Yesterday's violets have withered and died, but today my poppies bloom.
character.botc-mc.flowergirl.name: Market Girl
character.botc-mc.flowergirl.other: Either nod or shake yer noggin.
character.botc-mc.fool.ability: The 1st time ye join the locker, ye don't.
character.botc-mc.fool.flavor: ...and the King said 'What?! I've never even owned a pair of rubber pantaloons, let alone a custard cannon!' Ho-ho! Jolly day!
character.botc-mc.fool.name: Jester
character.botc-mc.fortuneteller.ability: Ev'ry moon, pick 2 mateys: ye be told if either be a Beast o' the Sea. There be a good'un that passes for a Beast o' the Sea to ye.
character.botc-mc.fortuneteller.first: The Soothsayer picks 2 mateys. Nod if either be the Beast o' the Sea (or the *BLOODY HERRING*).
character.botc-mc.fortuneteller.flavor: I sense great evil in your soul! But... that could just be your perfume. I am allergic to Elderberry.
character.botc-mc.fortuneteller.name: Soothsayer
character.botc-mc.fortuneteller.other: The Soothsayer picks 2 mateys. Nod if either be the Beast o' the Sea (or the *BLOODY HERRING*).
character.botc-mc.gambler.ability: Ev'ry moon*, pick a matey & guess their station: if ye be wrong, ye join the locker.
character.botc-mc.gambler.flavor: Heads, I prevail. Tails, ye sink.
character.botc-mc.gambler.name: Gambler
character.botc-mc.gambler.other: The Gambler picks a matey & a station. :reminder:
character.botc-mc.gangster.ability: Once per daylight, ye can send a livin' bunkmate to the locker, if yer other livin' bunkmate agrees.
character.botc-mc.gangster.flavor: Ye've got space on this ship for me, haven't ye? Ye'd better not say no, if ye know what's good for ye...
character.botc-mc.gangster.name: Outlaw
character.botc-mc.gardener.ability: The Captain picks 1 or more mateys' stations.
character.botc-mc.gardener.flavor: When sophistry becomes stupidity and hypocrisy cruelty, retreat to the garden. The final love of old men is flowers and stones.
character.botc-mc.gardener.name: Gardener
character.botc-mc.general.ability: Ev'ry moon, ye be told which crew the Captain thinks be prevailing: the good'uns, the bad'uns, or neither.
character.botc-mc.general.flavor: I don’t have time for quotes.
character.botc-mc.general.name: Admiral
character.botc-mc.gnome.ability: All mateys join knowin' a matey of your loyalty. Ye can send anyone who accuses them to the locker.
character.botc-mc.gnome.flavor: Four the score or seven beers, no shows are goes for me and my. A prank to crack the cranks and planks o’ the floor foundation length, so incontravertabubbilly mini. The large essays down streams of joyse, no greater than is scene, not inherdt. Ha-urrumph.
character.botc-mc.gnome.name: Gremlin
character.botc-mc.goblin.ability: If'n ye claim to be the Goblin when accused & ye walk the plank that daylight, yer crew prevails.
character.botc-mc.goblin.name: Goblin
character.botc-mc.godfather.ability: Ye join knowin' which Stowaways be aboard. If one joined the locker in the last daylight, pick a matey this moon: they join the locker. [-1 or +1 Stowaway]
character.botc-mc.godfather.first: Show the station marks of all aboard Stowaways.
character.botc-mc.godfather.flavor: I have some very important clients in Havana. They'd be very disappointed if anything happened to their special goods and guests. And so would I.
character.botc-mc.godfather.name: Smuggler
character.botc-mc.godfather.other: If'n a Stowaway joined the locker in the last daylight, the Smuggler picks a matey. :reminder:
character.botc-mc.golem.ability: Ye can only accuse once on yer journey. When ye do, if the accusee be not the Beast o' the Sea, they join the locker.
character.botc-mc.golem.name: Bungler
character.botc-mc.goon.ability: Ev'ry moon, the 1st matey to pick you wi' their trade be tipsy until sun down. Ye turn their loyalty.
character.botc-mc.goon.flavor: Yes boss. I explained fings real good to dat geezer. He don't want me explain it again. Nah boss, I don't need no doctor - it's only a knife wound. Be right come mornin'
character.botc-mc.goon.name: Ruffian
character.botc-mc.gossip.ability: Ev'ry day, ye can say something on deck. Next moon, were it true, a matey joins the locker.
character.botc-mc.gossip.flavor: They say loose lips sink ships, but we're still floating!
character.botc-mc.gossip.name: Gossip
character.botc-mc.gossip.other: If'n the Gossip should send a matey to the locker, they do. :reminder:
character.botc-mc.grandmother.ability: Ye join knowin' a good'un & their station. If'n the Beast o' the Sea sends them to the locker, ye join too.
character.botc-mc.grandmother.first: Point at the grandchild matey & show their station mark.
character.botc-mc.grandmother.flavor: You know I don't like your sailing mates, dear. At least promise to wrap up warm. It's cold at sea, what would I do without you?
character.botc-mc.grandmother.name: Grandmother
character.botc-mc.grandmother.other: If'n the grandchild were sent to the locker by the Beast o' the Sea, the Grandmother also joins. :reminder:
character.botc-mc.gunslinger.ability: Ev'ry daylight, after the 1st ayes have been counted, ye can pick a player who said aye: they join the locker.
character.botc-mc.gunslinger.flavor: It's time someone took matters into their own hands. That someone... is me.
character.botc-mc.gunslinger.name: Arquebusier
character.botc-mc.harlot.ability: Ev'ry moon*, pick a livin' matey: if'n they agree, ye be told their station, but ye both mayhaps join the locker.
character.botc-mc.harlot.flavor: Enchanté, Sailor. You look like you need someone to really listen to your troubles. I'm a good listener. Very, very good.
character.botc-mc.harlot.name: Harlot
character.botc-mc.harlot.other: The Harlot points at a livin' matey. Send 'em to slumber. Rouse the picked matey, show 'em the *THIS STATION PICKED YE* mark, then the Harlot mark. That matey either nods or shakes their noggin. If they nodded, rouse the Harlot and show the picked matey's station mark. Them ye can pick if both mateys join the locker.
character.botc-mc.harpy.ability: Ev'ry moon, pick 2 mateys: in the morrow, the 1st matey be addled that the 2nd be a bad'un, or mayhaps one or both be sent to the locker.
character.botc-mc.harpy.first: The Siren picks two mateys. :reminder: :reminder: Send the Siren to slumber. Rouse the 1st pick. Show the *THIS MATEY PICKED YOU* mark, the Siren mark, then point at the 2nd pick.
character.botc-mc.harpy.flavor: I ne'er seen the seas so prime, so let's have a wail of a time.
character.botc-mc.harpy.name: Siren
character.botc-mc.harpy.other: The Siren picks two mateys. :reminder: :reminder: Send the Siren to slumber. Rouse the 1st pick. Show the *THIS MATEY PICKED YE* mark, the Siren mark, then point at the 2nd pick.
character.botc-mc.hatter.ability: If'n ye joined the locker last daylight or this moon, the Scallywag and Beast o' the Sea mateys can pick new Scallywags and Beasts o' the Sea to be.
character.botc-mc.hatter.flavor: Ἦ μὲν, ταῦτα τὰ πτερύγια ἡδέως ἐπιδεῖξονται ἐπὶ τῷ φίλῳ Ἰκάρῳ τῷ υἱῷ μου· νῦν δέ, ἐξ ὧν κτίσω τὸ σημεῖον
character.botc-mc.hatter.name: Daedalus
character.botc-mc.hatter.other: If'n Daedalus joined the locker last daylight or under this moon, rouse the Scallywags and Beasts o' the Sea and let them pick new stations.
character.botc-mc.hellslibrarian.ability: Something mayhaps goes wrong for whoever runs their mouth when the Captain called for quiet.
character.botc-mc.hellslibrarian.flavor: The more you speak, the more we reap, we'll make you weak, we'll watch you weep.
character.botc-mc.hellslibrarian.name: Fair Folk
character.botc-mc.heretic.ability: Those who prevail, sink and those who sink, prevail, even if ye be in the locker.
character.botc-mc.heretic.flavor: Anglican, Calvinist, Catholic, Muslim. Who cares what your confession is? Our souls are damned regardless.
character.botc-mc.heretic.name: Heretic
character.botc-mc.hermit.ability: Ye work all Stowaway trades. [-0 or -1 Stowaway]
character.botc-mc.hermit.flavor: Life be precious. There be much to do.
character.botc-mc.hermit.name: Anchorite
character.botc-mc.highpriestess.ability: Ev'ry moon, ye be told which matey the captain tinks ye should parley with the most.
character.botc-mc.highpriestess.flavor: There be life behind the personality that uses personalities as masks. There be times when life puts off the mask and deep answers to deep.
character.botc-mc.highpriestess.name: High Priestess
character.botc-mc.huntsman.ability: Once in yer journey, under the moon, pick a livin' matey: the Quarry, if picked, becomes a not-in-play Crewmate. [+the Quarry]
character.botc-mc.huntsman.first: The Tracker can pick a matey. :reminder: If that matey were the Quarry: put the Tracker to slumber. Rouse the Quarry and show them the *YOU ARE* mark and their new station mark.
character.botc-mc.huntsman.flavor: Three degrees to port. Now, one to starboard. This is going to be the catch of a lifetime. Brace, deckhands, for our quarry awaits us.
character.botc-mc.huntsman.name: Tracker
character.botc-mc.huntsman.other: The Tracker can pick a matey. :reminder: If that matey were the Quarry: put the Tracker to slumber. Rouse the Quarry and show them the *YOU ARE* mark and their new station mark.
character.botc-mc.imp.ability: Ev'ry moon*, pick a matey: they join the locker. If'n ye send yerself to the locker like this, a Scallywag becomes the Bogie.
character.botc-mc.imp.flavor: We all knew that turning to a life of piracy would bring grave peril. We could never have foretold how the Devil himself walks among us. But I promise you this. I will stop this from becoming a ghost ship.
character.botc-mc.imp.name: Bogie
character.botc-mc.imp.other: The Bogie picks a matey. :reminder: If the Bogie picked themselves: change 1 livin' Scallywag mark for a spare Bogie mark. Send the old Bogie to slumber. Rouse the new Bogie. Show the *YE BE* mark, then the Bogie mark.
character.botc-mc.innkeeper.ability: Ev'ry moon*, pick 2 mateys: they can't join the locker this moon, but 1 be tipsy until sun down.
character.botc-mc.innkeeper.flavor: Come on in, good sailors, and rest a while. Can I get ye some rum, or fine ale? Poseidon's own can't get to ye here.
character.botc-mc.innkeeper.name: Tavern Keeper
character.botc-mc.investigator.ability: Ye join knowin' that 1 o' 2 mateys be a given Scallywag.
character.botc-mc.investigator.first: Show the Scallywag station mark. Point at both the *SCALLYWAG* and *WRONG* mateys.
character.botc-mc.investigator.flavor: Be that the deed for a new plantation in yer pocket, or be ye just pleased to see me?
character.botc-mc.investigator.name: Bloodhound
character.botc-mc.judge.ability: Once in yer journey, if another matey accused some'n, ye can make the accusation pass or fail.
character.botc-mc.judge.flavor: As a Justice of the Admiralty, I think thee shalt find that the King himself hath vested me with the authority to sentence anyone suspected of piracy as I see fit. Now, thou wouldst not have seen any of those godless criminals around, would'st thee?
character.botc-mc.judge.name: Justice
character.botc-mc.juggler.ability: During yer 1st daylight, guess up to 5 mateys' stations on deck. That moon, ye be told how many were right.
character.botc-mc.juggler.flavor: A cutlass, a pistol, a cannonball, a square cut from the mast and the teeth o' a kraken. Who can keep all five in the air?
character.botc-mc.juggler.name: Juggler
character.botc-mc.juggler.other: Make a gesture with yer fingers.
character.botc-mc.kazali.ability: Ev'ry moon*, pick a matey: the join the locker. [Ye pick which mateys be which Scallywags. -? to +? Stowaways]
character.botc-mc.kazali.first: Rouse the Kazali, let 'em pick Scallywags.
character.botc-mc.kazali.flavor: Gon(z)a7les6. Take cau8tun. The mech4an4ion is iNvert10d. E99ors insy6tum. Reco{7}fig.
character.botc-mc.kazali.name: Kazali
character.botc-mc.king.ability: Ev'ry moon, if'n the count o' those in the locker is the same as or more than there be livin', ye learn 1 livin' station. The Beast o' the Sea knows ye be the King.
character.botc-mc.king.first: Rouse the Beast o' the Sea. Show the *THIS MATEY BE* mark and the King mark, then point at the King.
character.botc-mc.king.flavor: This is now a vessel of the Crown, and ye fine and gentle folk are now a part of the Royal Navy.
character.botc-mc.king.name: King
character.botc-mc.king.other: If'n the count o' those in the locker be the same as or more than those livin', show the station mark o' a livin' matey.
character.botc-mc.klutz.ability: When ye be told that ye be in the locker, on deck, pick a livin' matey: if they be a bad'un, yer crew sinks.
character.botc-mc.klutz.name: Fumbler
character.botc-mc.knight.ability: Ye join knowin' 2 mateys be not the Beast o' the Sea.
character.botc-mc.knight.first: Point at the two non-Beast o' the Sea mateys wi' the *KNOW* mark.
character.botc-mc.knight.flavor: All I know is, those two were still at sea when the Captain were stabbed.
character.botc-mc.knight.name: Scout
character.botc-mc.legion.ability: Ev’ry moon*, a matey might join the locker. Plank walks be failin' if only bad’uns said aye. Ye also pass fer a scallywag. [Most mateys be Mutineers.]
character.botc-mc.legion.flavor: The Captain's with Davy Jones now. The ship will be ours, we need just bide our time a little longer...
character.botc-mc.legion.name: Mutineer
character.botc-mc.legion.other: A matey might enter the locker. :reminder:
character.botc-mc.leviathan.ability: If'n more than 1 good'un walks the plank, the bad'uns prevail. All mateys know ye be aboard. After fifth sunset, the bad'uns prevail.
character.botc-mc.leviathan.first: Tell on deck that "The Kraken be aboard." Give the Kraken the *SUNRISE 1* 'memberin mark. :reminder:
character.botc-mc.leviathan.flavor: I am released, and now, I come for thee.
character.botc-mc.leviathan.name: Kraken
character.botc-mc.leviathan.other: If'n ye want, tell on deck that "The Kraken be aboard". Change the 'memberin 'mark. :reminder:
character.botc-mc.librarian.ability: Ye join knowin' that one o' two mateys be a given Stowaway. (or that none be aboard.)
character.botc-mc.librarian.first: Show the Stowaway station mark. Point at both the *STOWAWAY* and *WRONG* mateys.
character.botc-mc.librarian.flavor: I checked the decks and I found that that augur we picked up has been at the rum again.
character.botc-mc.librarian.name: Bosun
character.botc-mc.lilmonsta.ability: Ev'ry moon, Scallywags pick who babysists Lil' Monsta & "is the Beast o' the Sea". Ev'ry moon*, a matey mayhaps joins the locker. [+1 Scallywag]
character.botc-mc.lilmonsta.first: Rouse all Scallywags, let 'em pick a babysitter. :reminder:
character.botc-mc.lilmonsta.flavor: Step 1: Be cute. Step 2: World domination. Step 3: Bweakfast.
character.botc-mc.lilmonsta.name: Lil' Monsta
character.botc-mc.lilmonsta.other: Rouse all Scallywags, let 'em pick a babysitter. :reminder: A matey mayhap joins the locker. :reminder:
character.botc-mc.lleech.ability: Ev'ry moon*, pick a matey: they join the locker. Pick a matey when ye join: they be seasick. Ye join the locker if & only if they be in the locker.
character.botc-mc.lleech.flavor: Tasty, tasty, tasty, tasty, tasty, tasty, tasty, tasty brai- I mean pie! Yes. Tasty pie. That’s what I meant to say.
character.botc-mc.lleech.name: Lleech
character.botc-mc.lordoftyphon.ability: Ev'ry moon, pick a matey: the join the locker. [Ne'erdowells be in a row. Ye be in the middle. +1 Scallywag. -? to +? Stowaways]
character.botc-mc.lordoftyphon.first: Change bunkmates o' Poseidon's Spear wi' Scallywags, rouse 'em, tell 'em their new loyalty and station, then do Scallywag knowin's.
character.botc-mc.lordoftyphon.flavor: In the shadowed and forgotten corners of the cosmos, where the stars whisper secrets to the void, lies a truth so profound that the merest glimpse of it unravels the sanity of mortal minds.
character.botc-mc.lordoftyphon.name: Poseidon's Spear
character.botc-mc.lunatic.ability: Ye tink ye be a Beast o' the Sea, be yer not. The Beast o' the Sea knows who ye be and who ye pick under the moon.
character.botc-mc.lunatic.first: If'n there be 7 or more mateys, rouse the Lunatic: show the *THESE BE YER SCALLYWAGS* mark. Point at any mateys. Show the *THESE STATIONS BE ASHORE* mark. Show 3 deckhand marks. Send the Lunatic to slumber. Rouse the Beast o' the Sea. Show the *YE BE* mark and the Beast o' the Sea mark. Show the *THIS MATEY BE* mark and the Lunatic mark, and point at the Lunatic.
character.botc-mc.lunatic.name: Lunatic
character.botc-mc.lunatic.other: Do what needs be done to make the Lunatic tink they be the Beast o' the Sea. Send the Lunatic to slumber. Show the Lunatic mark & point at them, then their pick(s).
character.botc-mc.lycanthrope.ability: Ev'ry moon*, pick a livin' matey. If they be a good'un, they join the locker & the Beast o' the Sea doesn't send anyone to the locker this moon. One good'un passes for a bad'un.
character.botc-mc.lycanthrope.name: Werewolf
character.botc-mc.magician.ability: The Beast o' the Sea tinks ye be a Scallywag. Scallywags tink ye be a Beast o' the Sea.
character.botc-mc.magician.first: Show the Scallywags and Beasts o' the Sea the Magician in their knowin's.
character.botc-mc.magician.flavor: 1... 2... Abra... 3... 4... Cadabra... *poof!* And, as you can see, ladies and gentlemen, Captain Farnsworth’s bag of gold has disappeared! Gone! Without a trace! Thank you, and goodnight!
character.botc-mc.magician.name: Magician
character.botc-mc.marionette.ability: Ye tink ye be a good'un, but ye be not. The Beast o' the Sea be told who ye be. [Ye be bunkmates wi' the Beast o' the Sea]
character.botc-mc.marionette.first: Rouse the Beast o' the Sea. Point to the matey marked *BE THE PUPPET* and show the *THIS MATEY BE* token and the Puppet station mark.
character.botc-mc.marionette.flavor: I'm a marionette. Just a marionette. Pull my strings.
character.botc-mc.marionette.name: Puppet
character.botc-mc.mastermind.ability: If'n the Beast o' the Sea joins the locker by walkin' the plank (ending the journey), sail for one more sun. If a matey then walks the plank, their crew sinks.
character.botc-mc.mastermind.flavor: The monster lies slain on the deck. They've brought out the special reserve of rum. Excellent. Everything is proceeding exactly as I have planned.
character.botc-mc.mastermind.name: Plotter
character.botc-mc.mathematician.ability: Ev'ry moon, you be told how many mateys' trades went wrong (since sun up) thanks to another station's trade.
character.botc-mc.mathematician.first: Make a gesture with yer fingers.
character.botc-mc.mathematician.name: Bean Counter
character.botc-mc.mathematician.other: Make a gesture with yer fingers.
character.botc-mc.matron.ability: Ev'ry daylight, ye can pick up to 3 sets o' 2 mateys to swap seats. Mateys must stay on deck.
character.botc-mc.matron.flavor: Captain Featherbottom, be quiet. Master Rutherford, a teacup needs just the four fingers, please. I know you've been sailing for five months, but weariness is no excuse for poor manners.
character.botc-mc.matron.name: Matron
character.botc-mc.mayor.ability: If'n just 3 mateys be livin' & nobody walks the plank, yer crew prevails. If'n ye should join the locker under the moon, another matey mayhaps joins it instead.
character.botc-mc.mayor.flavor: With the Cap'n in the locker, I be thinkin' we need a new Captain. I be the next in line, but I be needin' the support o' the crew. What d'ye say?
character.botc-mc.mayor.name: Quartermaster
character.botc-mc.mezepheles.ability: Ye join knowin' a secret word. The 1st good'un to say it becomes a bad'un next moon.
character.botc-mc.mezepheles.first: Show the word, if ye can write.
character.botc-mc.mezepheles.flavor: I would love to share a drink with ye. Shall we step below deck..?
character.botc-mc.mezepheles.name: Incubus
character.botc-mc.mezepheles.other: if a matey has the *TURNS BAD* mark, rouse them. Show the *YE BE* mark and a thumbs down. The Incubus stops workin' their trade. :reminder:
character.botc-mc.minioninfo.first: If'n there be 7 or more mateys, rouse all Scallywags: show the *THIS BE THE BEAST O' THE SEA* mark. Point at the Beast o' the Sea. Show the *THESE BE YER SCALLYWAGS* mark. Point at the other Scallywags.
character.botc-mc.minioninfo.name: Scallywag Knowin'
character.botc-mc.minstrel.ability: When a Scallywag joins the locker by walkin' the plank, all other mateys (except Landlubbers) be tipsy until sun down after next daylight.
character.botc-mc.minstrel.flavor: And one to the other, ye'll hear them say, "Goodbye, fare ye well! Goodbye, fare ye well!" And here comes Johnny with fourteen months' pay! Hoorah, me boys, we're homeward bound!
character.botc-mc.minstrel.name: Shanty-Man
character.botc-mc.monk.ability: Ev'ry moon*, pick a matey (not yerself): they be safe from the Beast o' the Sea this moon.
character.botc-mc.monk.flavor: 'Tis an ill and deathly wind that blows tonight. Come, my brother, take shelter in the abbey while the storm rages. By my word, or by my life, you will be safe.
character.botc-mc.monk.name: Jesuit
character.botc-mc.moonchild.ability: When ye be told that ye joined the locker, on deck pick 1 livin' matey. Next moon, were it a good'un, they join the locker.
character.botc-mc.moonchild.flavor: Scorpio looks sideways at the lovers, and you have a choice to make. With silver cross my palm, and your fate shall be revealed. With steel cross my throat, and by the stars you shall regret it.
character.botc-mc.moonchild.name: Moonchild
character.botc-mc.moonchild.other: If'n the Moonchild be set to send a good'un to the locker, they join it. :reminder:
character.botc-mc.mutant.ability: If'n yer "delirious" that yer a Stowaway, ye might be thrown overboard.
character.botc-mc.mutant.flavor: I be an honest sailer, just like ye! Let me be!
character.botc-mc.mutant.name: Changeling
character.botc-mc.nightwatchman.ability: Once on yer journey, under the moon, pick a matey: they learn ye be the Deck-Watch.
character.botc-mc.nightwatchman.first: The Deck-Watch can pick a player. :reminder: Send the Deck-Watch to slumber. Rouse the pick and show the *THIS MATEY BE* and Deck-Watch marks and point at the Deck-Watch.
character.botc-mc.nightwatchman.name: Deck-Watch
character.botc-mc.nightwatchman.other: The Deck-Watch can pick a player. :reminder: Send the Deck-Watch to slumber. Rouse the pick and show the *THIS MATEY BE* and Deck-Watch marks and point at the Deck-Watch.
character.botc-mc.noble.ability: Ye join knowin' 3 mateys, 1 and only one o' which be a bad'un.
character.botc-mc.noble.first: Point at all three mateys marked *KNOW*.
character.botc-mc.noble.flavor: Sarcasm is indeed the lowest form of wit. But speaking in response to your criticism, Sir, it is, nevertheless, a form of wit.
character.botc-mc.noble.name: Blueblood
character.botc-mc.nodashii.ability: Ev'ry moon*, pick a matey: they join the locker. Yer 2 Crewmate bunkmates be seasick.
character.botc-mc.nodashii.flavor: By the sins of Arnoch, I feel thy laden stench. By the curs-ed sun and her foul legion of tiny grinning gods, I corrupt thee. By the blessed night and the hidden depths of the horrid and unholy sea, I end thy squalid life upon this plane.
character.botc-mc.nodashii.name: No Dashii
character.botc-mc.nodashii.other: The No Dashii picks a matey. :reminder:
character.botc-mc.ogre.ability: Under yer 1st moon, pick a matey (not yerself): you become their loyalty (ye don't know which) even if tipsy or seasick.
character.botc-mc.ogre.first: The Ogre points at a matey. :reminder:
character.botc-mc.ogre.name: Ogre
character.botc-mc.ojo.ability: Ev’ry moon, pick a position: they be joinin' the locker. If'n they be ashore, the captain picks who joins the locker.
character.botc-mc.ojo.flavor: Like a bonfire on a moonless night… I see you, mortal.
character.botc-mc.ojo.name: Ojo
character.botc-mc.oracle.ability: Ev'ry moon*, ye be told how many players in the locker be bad'uns.
character.botc-mc.oracle.flavor: Only the chosen may gaze beyond the veil. The dead are restless, and they point in silence toward the icy north.
character.botc-mc.oracle.name: Augur
character.botc-mc.oracle.other: Make a gesture with yer fingers.
character.botc-mc.organgrinder.ability: All mateys keep their peepers shut when it be time for accusals and the count be known only by the Captain. Ev'ry moon, pick if ye be tipsy until sun down.
character.botc-mc.organgrinder.first: The Vielleux nods their noggin to be tipsy, or shakes it to be decent. :reminder:
character.botc-mc.organgrinder.flavor: But how can you hear each other talk over my hurdy-gurdy?
character.botc-mc.organgrinder.name: Vielleux
character.botc-mc.organgrinder.other: The Vielleux nods their noggin to be tipsy, or shakes it to be decent. :reminder:
character.botc-mc.pacifist.ability: Good'uns who walk the plank mayhaps don't join the locker.
character.botc-mc.pacifist.flavor: Man overboard! Does no one else know how to swim around here?
character.botc-mc.pacifist.name: Lifeguard
character.botc-mc.philosopher.ability: Once in yer journey, under the moon, pick a good station: work that trade. If'n that station be aboard, they be tipsy.
character.botc-mc.philosopher.first: The Ponderer mayhaps picks a station. Needs be, swap their station mark. :reminder:
character.botc-mc.philosopher.flavor: If'n anything be true, grog be true. Drink, for in the morrow we mayhaps be with Davy Jones.
character.botc-mc.philosopher.name: Ponderer
character.botc-mc.philosopher.other: The Ponderer mayhaps picks a station. Needs be, swap their station mark. :reminder:
character.botc-mc.pithag.ability: Ev'ry moon*, pick a matey & a station for them to work (if not aboard). If a Beast o' the Sea be made, the Captain picks who joins the locker under this moon.
character.botc-mc.pithag.flavor: Round about the cauldron go; In the poison'd entrails throw; Toad, that under cold stone; Days and nights has thirty-one; Sweated venom sleeping got; Boil thou first in the charmed pot.
character.botc-mc.pithag.name: Pit-Hag
character.botc-mc.pithag.other: The Pit-Hag picks a matey & a station. If they picked a station that be ashore: send the Pit-Hag to slumber. Rouse the pick. Show the *YE BE* mark & their new station mark.
character.botc-mc.pixie.ability: Ye join knowin' 1 aboard crewmate. If ye were addled that ye worked this station, ye work their trade when they join the locker.
character.botc-mc.pixie.first: Show the Crewmate station mark with the *MAD* mark.
character.botc-mc.pixie.flavor: Hark, what doth the wind bring upon its beat? A ship? With sailors aboard? I wonder what they're up to... and if I can join them...
character.botc-mc.pixie.name: Imp
character.botc-mc.plaguedoctor.ability: When ye join the locker, the Captain works a Scallywag trade.
character.botc-mc.plaguedoctor.flavor: Eat your lemons. Smell your rosemary. If it weren't for me, this would be a plague ship.
character.botc-mc.plaguedoctor.name: Plague Doctor
character.botc-mc.plaguedoctor.other: If'n the Plague Doctor joined the locker, the Captain works a Scallywag trade. If ye haven't done this yet, do it now.
character.botc-mc.po.ability: Ev'ry moon*, ye can pick a matey: they die. If yer last pick were no one, pick 3 mateys this moon.
character.botc-mc.po.flavor: Would ye like a flower? I'm so lonely.
character.botc-mc.po.name: Po
character.botc-mc.po.other: The Po can pick a matey or picks the mateys if they picked no one last moon. :reminder: or :reminder: :reminder: :reminder:
character.botc-mc.poisoner.ability: Ev'ry moon, pick a matey: they be tipsy this moon and under the next daylight.
character.botc-mc.poisoner.flavor: A little hemlock, some foxglove... mustn't forget the nightshade...
character.botc-mc.poisoner.name: Poisoner
character.botc-mc.politician.ability: If'n ye were the matey (most responsible) for ye loyalty’s ship sinking, ye (change) loyalty & prevail, even if ye be in the locker.
character.botc-mc.politician.flavor: Absolutely, my lord. I'm fully on your side. And you know I'm on your side, so you know it doesn't matter that I'm going to talk to the other faction. Really, when I come back and tell you how much I'm still on your side, you should only trust me more!
character.botc-mc.politician.name: Courtier
character.botc-mc.poppygrower.ability: Scallywags & Beasts o' the Sea don't know each other. If ye join the locker, they be told who each other are under the moon.
character.botc-mc.poppygrower.first: Do not give the Scallywags and Beasts o' the Sea their knowin's. Rouse the Beast o' the Seat, show the *THE STATIONS BE ASHORE* mark and any three Deckhand marks that be ashore.
character.botc-mc.poppygrower.flavor: In the hidden groves of the deep forest, the black poppy dwells. To see its revelry is to be enchanted. To smell its thick aroma is to be lost forever, a slave to the gods of light and dark.
character.botc-mc.poppygrower.name: Poppy Grower
character.botc-mc.poppygrower.other: If'n the Poppy Grower joined the locker under this moon or the last daylight, rouse the Scallywags, show the *THIS BE THE BEAST O' THE SEA* mark, and point at the Beast o' the Sea. Send them to slumber. Rouse the Beast o' the Sea, show the *THESE BE YER SCALLYWAGS* mark, and point at the Scallywags. Send the Beast o' the Sea to slumber.
character.botc-mc.preacher.ability: Ev'ry moon, pick a matey: a Scallywag, if picked, be told this. All picked Scallywags work no trade.
character.botc-mc.preacher.first: The Missionary picks a matey. :reminder: If'n they picked a Scallywag: put the Missionary to slumber. Rouse the pick. Show the *THIS STATION PICKED YE* mark and the Missionary mark.
character.botc-mc.preacher.flavor: 'Tis better to be rich and whole than poor and sick.
character.botc-mc.preacher.name: Missionary
character.botc-mc.preacher.other: The Missionary picks a matey. :reminder: If they picked a Scallywag: put the Missionary to slumber. Rouse the pick. Show the *THIS STATION PICKED YE* mark and the Missionary mark.
character.botc-mc.princess.ability: Under yer 1st daylight, if ye accused a matey & made them walk the plank, the Beast o' the Sea doesn't send anyone to the locker under the next moon.
character.botc-mc.princess.flavor: Our words are hounds, bound by silken threads, dear lords. Let kindness weave them true, lest the reigns unravel and rend our court.
character.botc-mc.princess.name: Princess
character.botc-mc.princess.other: If'n the Princess accused the matey who walked the plank under last daylight, the Beast o' the Sea rouses like normal, but doesn't send anyone to the locker.
character.botc-mc.professor.ability: Once in yer journey, under the moon*, pick a matey in the locker: if they be a Crewmate, they be livin'.
character.botc-mc.professor.name: Necromancer
character.botc-mc.professor.other: The Necromancer might pick a matey in the locker. :reminder: :reminder:
character.botc-mc.psychopath.ability: Ev'ry daylight, afore accusals and on deck, ye can pick a matey: they join the locker. If ye walk the plank, ye join the locker only if ye lose at Shoushiling.
character.botc-mc.psychopath.name: Fiend
character.botc-mc.pukka.ability: Ev'ry moon, pick a matey: they be seasick. The last player ye made seasick joins the locker, then is whole.
character.botc-mc.pukka.flavor: You truly have been kind welcoming me onto your beautiful vessel. I am so sorry I accidentally scratched you. A little thing. No matter. But please, take this golden toothpick as a humble token of my regret.
character.botc-mc.pukka.name: Pukka
character.botc-mc.pukka.other: The Pukka picks a matey. :reminder: The matey they previously made seasick joins the locker, then is made whole. :reminder:
character.botc-mc.puzzlemaster.ability: 1 matey be tipsy, even if ye join the locker. If ye guess (once) who it be, learn the matey who be the Beast o' the Sea, but guess wrong and get scurvey.
character.botc-mc.puzzlemaster.flavor: If all men fear the sea, and all pirates are men, and all who feel fear drink to ease their woes, and we are at sea, then it follows that the pirate who is tipsy is... a pirate!
character.botc-mc.puzzlemaster.name: Logician
character.botc-mc.ravenkeeper.ability: If'n ye join the locker under the moon, ye be roused to pick a matey: ye be told their station.
character.botc-mc.ravenkeeper.name: Pigeon-keeper
character.botc-mc.ravenkeeper.other: If'n the Pigeon-Keeper joined the locker under this moon, the Pigeon-Keeper picks a matey. Show that matey's station mark.
character.botc-mc.recluse.ability: Ye pass for a bad'un & as a Ne'erdowell mayhap, even when in the locker.
character.botc-mc.recluse.flavor: One pistol. One shot. And one measure o' rum. Might as well o' been hung for a sheep as a lamb.
character.botc-mc.recluse.name: Marooned
character.botc-mc.revolutionary.ability: 2 bunkmates are known to share a loyalty. Once in the journey, one passes for something else.
character.botc-mc.revolutionary.flavor: I thinke that the poorest hee that is in England hath a life to live as the greatest hee; and therefore truly, Sir, I thinke itt's cleare, that every man that is to live under a Governement ought first by his owne consent to putt himself under that Governement; and I do think that the poorest man in England is not at all bound in a strict sense to that Government that he hath not had a voice to put Himself under.
character.botc-mc.revolutionary.name: Leveller
character.botc-mc.riot.ability: During the 3rd daylight, Scallywags become Riot & the accused join the locker but accuse a livin' matey sharp-like. This must happen.
character.botc-mc.riot.flavor: Larga vida a la revolución! Mi revolucion!
character.botc-mc.riot.name: Riot
character.botc-mc.sage.ability: If'n the Beast o' the Sea sends ye to the locker, ye be told that it be 1 o' 2 mateys.
character.botc-mc.sage.flavor: The map holds the secrets, I know it! Get me candles! I'll work under the moonlight if I need to!
character.botc-mc.sage.name: Cartographer
character.botc-mc.sage.other: If'n the Beast o' the Sea sent the Cartographer to the locker, rouse the Cartographer and point at 2 mateys, one o' which be the Beast o' the Sea.
character.botc-mc.sailor.ability: Ev'ry moon, pick a livin' matey: either ye or they be tipsy until sun down. Ye can't join the locker.
character.botc-mc.sailor.first: The Seaman picks a livin' matey. :reminder:
character.botc-mc.sailor.flavor: I'll drink any one of yer under the table! You! The chatterbox! Reckon you can take me? No? Howza 'bout you, Grandma? You ever tried Old McKillys Extra Spiced Rum before? Guaranteed to put hairs on yer chest! Step aboard, aye!
character.botc-mc.sailor.name: Seaman
character.botc-mc.sailor.other: The Seaman picks a livin' matey. :reminder:
character.botc-mc.saint.ability: If'n ye join the locker by walkin' the plank, yer crew sinks.
character.botc-mc.saint.flavor: Without a figurehead, a ship is nothing.
character.botc-mc.saint.name: Figurehead
character.botc-mc.savant.ability: Under ev'ry daylight, ye can visit the Captain alone to be told 2 things: 1 be true, 1 be scurvy.
character.botc-mc.savant.flavor: Seventy-two matchsticks on the floor... the sun sets early but the moon is unchanged... a torn piece of cloth... evil in the manor house... three by three... the one we trusted is not what he seems... green light means magnesium... residue, but the pattern is wrong... Seventy-two matchsticks on the floor...
character.botc-mc.savant.name: Visionary
character.botc-mc.scapegoat.ability: If'n a matey of yer loyalty walks the plank, ye mayhap walk it instead.
character.botc-mc.scapegoat.flavor: What can I do for ye? Oh, no, there's been a huge misunderstanding. I weren't in the victim's cabin last night. Oh, me hearty says I were? Oh, no...
character.botc-mc.scapegoat.name: Whipping Boy
character.botc-mc.scarletwoman.ability: If'n there be 5 or more mateys livin'& the Beast o' the Sea joins the locker, ye become the Beast o' the Sea. (Landlubbers don't count.)
character.botc-mc.scarletwoman.flavor: You have shown me the secrets of the Council of the Purple Flame. We have lain together in fire and in lust and in beastly commune, and I am forever your servant. But tonight, my dear, I am your master.
character.botc-mc.scarletwoman.name: Jezebel
character.botc-mc.scarletwoman.other: If'n the Jezebel turned the Beast o' the Sea under the past dayling, show them the *YE BE* mark, then the Beast o' the Sea mark.
character.botc-mc.seamstress.ability: Once on yer journey, under the moon, pick 2 mateys (not yerself): ye be told if they be the same loyalty.
character.botc-mc.seamstress.first: The Seamstress can pick 2 mateys. Nod or shake yer noggin. :reminder:
character.botc-mc.seamstress.flavor: Did you hear that stranger in the canvas coat put the word on our young Belle? And she said yes? Well, that's nothing compared to what Harry and that juggler got up to at the fair! The things I could say if I was a tattletale... my, yes.
character.botc-mc.seamstress.name: Seamstress
character.botc-mc.seamstress.other: The Seamstress can pick 2 mateys. Nod or shake yer noggin. :reminder:
character.botc-mc.sentinel.ability: There mayhaps be 1 more or less Stowaway aboard.
character.botc-mc.sentinel.flavor: Name, please. Papers, please. Weapons, please.
character.botc-mc.sentinel.name: Sentinel
character.botc-mc.shabaloth.ability: Ev'ry moon*, pick 2 mateys: they join the locker. A matey in the locker ye picked last moon mayhaps be livin'.
character.botc-mc.shabaloth.name: Great Whale
character.botc-mc.shabaloth.other: A player picked last moon mayhap be livin. :reminder: The Great Whale picks 2 mateys. :reminder: :reminder:
character.botc-mc.shugenja.ability: Ye join knowin' if yer closest bad'un be left or right. If they be as close either way, ye can be told either.
character.botc-mc.shugenja.first: Point left or right around the ship.
character.botc-mc.shugenja.flavor: これは夢。それも夢。すべて夢です。
character.botc-mc.shugenja.name: Shugenja
character.botc-mc.slayer.ability: Once on yer journey, in daylight, pick a matey on deck: if they be the Beast o' the Sea, they join the locker.
character.botc-mc.slayer.name: Hunter
character.botc-mc.snakecharmer.ability: Ev'ry moon, pick a livin' matey: a Beast o' the Sea ye picked swaps station and loyalty wi' ye & is then seasick.
character.botc-mc.snakecharmer.first: The Shark-Singer picks a matey. If they picked the Beast o' the Sea: show the *YE BE* and Beast o' the Sea marks. Give a thumbs down. Swap the Shark-Singer and Beast o' the Sea marks. Send the old Shark-Singer to slumber. Rouse the old Beast o' the Sea. Show the *YE BE* and Shark-Singer marks and give a thumbs up. :reminder:
character.botc-mc.snakecharmer.flavor: The waves themselves belong to me. I am the sea.
character.botc-mc.snakecharmer.name: Shark-Singer
character.botc-mc.snakecharmer.other: The Shark-Singer picks a matey. If they picked the Beast o' the Sea: show the *YE BE* and Beast o' the Sea marks. Give a thumbs down. Swap the Shark-Singer and Beast o' the Sea marks. Send the old Shark-Singer to slumber. Rouse the old Beast o' the Sea. Show the *YE BE* and Shark-Singer marks and give a thumbs up. :reminder:
character.botc-mc.snitch.ability: All the Scallywags get 3 Fool's Marks.
character.botc-mc.snitch.first: Rouse each Scallywag. Show the *THESE STATIONS BE ASHORE* mark and 3 ashore station marks. Send each Scallywag to slumber.
character.botc-mc.snitch.name: Stool-Pigeon
character.botc-mc.soldier.ability: Ye be immune to the Beast o’ the Sea.
character.botc-mc.soldier.flavor: As David said to Goliath, as Theseus said to the Minotaur, as Arjuna said to Bhagadatta... No.
character.botc-mc.soldier.name: Marine
character.botc-mc.spiritofivory.ability: There be no more than 1 more bad'un.
character.botc-mc.spiritofivory.flavor: Though the waters be rough, with me as yer guide, there be naught to fear. Saint Elmo be with ye this moon, good sailors.
character.botc-mc.spiritofivory.name: St. Elmo's Fire
character.botc-mc.spy.ability: Ev'ry moon, ye see the map. Ye mayhaps pass fer a good'un & as a deckhand, even if ye be in the locker.
character.botc-mc.spy.first: Show the Map for as long as the Sneak needs.
character.botc-mc.spy.flavor: I'm glad ye like me moustaches and eyeglasses. Nay, don't pull on them.
character.botc-mc.spy.name: Sneak
character.botc-mc.spy.other: Show the Map for as long as the Sneak needs.
character.botc-mc.steward.flavor: The Quartermaster has seen us through thick and thin. We need to stick with him through these troubled waters.
character.botc-mc.steward.name: Steward
character.botc-mc.stormcatcher.ability: Name a Deckhand. If they be aboard, they can only join the locker by walkin' the plank, but bad'uns learn which matey it be.
character.botc-mc.stormcatcher.first: As ye leave port, tell the crew which station be stormridden. If'n that station be aboard mark that matey as *STORMRIDDEN*. :reminder: Rouse each bad'un and show 'em the station mark, then the marked matey. If they be ashore, rouse each bad'un, show 'em the *THESE STATIONS BE ASHORE* mark and the right station mark.
character.botc-mc.stormcatcher.flavor: Storm ahead! I'll take you through it. No one gets hurt on my watch. Not tonight.
character.botc-mc.stormcatcher.name: Stormrider
character.botc-mc.summoner.ability: Ye get 3 Fool's Marks. Under the 3rd moon, pick a matey: pick a bad'un Beast o' the Sea for them. [No Beast o' the Sea]
character.botc-mc.summoner.first: Show the *THESE STATIONS BE ASHORE* mark. Show 3 ashore Deckhand marks.
character.botc-mc.summoner.flavor: By the black tides and the cursed moon, I do call forth from the fathomless deep a terror unseen by mortal eye. Come forth, O Leviathan of shadowed waters, hear my conjuration! Let thy coils rise and thy roar rend the heavens, that these so-called noble mariners know fear as the salt and the brine shall claim their bones. By eldritch vow and sea-witch’s hand, I bind thee to my will.
character.botc-mc.summoner.name: Summoner
character.botc-mc.summoner.other: Changer the Summoner memberin' mark to the right moon. If it be the 3rd moon, the Summoner picks a mater and a Beast o' the Sea. Send the Summoner to slumber. Rouse the picked matey. Show the *YE BE* mark, a thumbs down, and the picked Beast o' the Sea mark.
character.botc-mc.sweetheart.ability: If ye join the locker, 1 matey be tipsy for the rest o' yer journey.
character.botc-mc.sweetheart.name: Sweeting
character.botc-mc.sweetheart.other: If the Sweeting joined the locker, a matey became tipsy sharp-like. If ye haven't done it yet, do it now. :reminder:
character.botc-mc.tealady.ability: If'n both yer livin' bunkmates be good'uns, they can't join the locker.
character.botc-mc.tealady.flavor: Fifteen men on a dead man's chest. Yo ho ho and a bottle o' rum. Drink and the Devil had done for the rest. Yo ho ho and a bottle o' rum.
character.botc-mc.tealady.name: Rum Pourer
character.botc-mc.thief.ability: Ev'ry moon, pick a matey (not yerself): their aye weighs against them in the morrow.
character.botc-mc.thief.flavor: I did nowt wrong! You can't prove it! I didn't nick the Governor's fancy case o' rum! It wouldn't fit through the door!
character.botc-mc.thief.name: Thief
character.botc-mc.tinker.ability: Ye mayhap join the locker at any time.
character.botc-mc.tinker.flavor: Arr, I see yer problem. All we needs to do be to add a shorter fuse! Now, I just need to test it...
character.botc-mc.tinker.name: Tinkerer
character.botc-mc.tinker.other: The Tinkerer mayhaps joins the locker. :reminder:
character.botc-mc.tor.ability: Mateys don't know their station or loyalty. They be told them if they join the locker.
character.botc-mc.tor.first: If'n a matey died under the moon, show the *YE BE* mark, their station mark, & a thumbs up or down.
character.botc-mc.tor.flavor: Ah, ye be driftin’ too close to the depths, mate. The tide’s hungry tonight, and I’m hungrier still. Cross me waters, and ye’ll find no bottom, no mercy, and no friendly wind to carry ye home. Mark me words: the sea takes her due, and I’m the one keepin’ tally.
character.botc-mc.tor.name: Davey Jones' Locker
character.botc-mc.towncrier.ability: Ev'ry moon*, ye be told if a Scallywag accused some'n under the last daylight.
character.botc-mc.towncrier.flavor: Hear ye! Hear ye! Pirates taking over shipping lanes! Notorious pirate captain dead at sea! Good seamen gone to waste! Hear Ye!
character.botc-mc.towncrier.name: Barrelman
character.botc-mc.toymaker.ability: The Beast o' the Sea can pick not to pick and has to at least once on the journey. Bad'uns get their usual knowin's.
character.botc-mc.toymaker.first: Give the Ne'erdowells their knowin's even though there be less than 7 mateys.
character.botc-mc.toymaker.flavor: Is no fun, is no Blinsky!
character.botc-mc.toymaker.name: Toymaker
character.botc-mc.toymaker.other: If a Beast o' the Sea could end the journey by attacking, and they be marked *LAST MOON: NO PICK*, the Beast o' the Sea doesn't rouse under this moon.
character.botc-mc.undertaker.ability: Ev'ry moon*, ye be told which station were sent to the locker by walkin' the plank uunder the last moon.
character.botc-mc.undertaker.flavor: Heave-ho, lads, I smell brimstone on this corpse. Let's get it overboard, afore it affects the rest o' the lads.
character.botc-mc.undertaker.name: Grave-Digger
character.botc-mc.undertaker.other: If'n a matey walked the plank today, show their station mark.
character.botc-mc.vigormortis.ability: Ev'ry moon, pick a matey: the join the locker. Scallywags ye send to the locker keep workin' their trade and make a Crewmate bunkmate seasick. [-1 Stowaway]
character.botc-mc.vigormortis.flavor: All doors are one door. All keys are one key. All cups are one cup, but whosoever drinketh of the water that I give shall never thirst, but the water shall be in him a well springing up into everlasting life.
character.botc-mc.vigormortis.name: Rigorrustus
character.botc-mc.vigormortis.other: The Vigormortis picks a matey. :reminder: If that matey be a Scallywag, make a crewmate bunkmate seasick. :reminder: :reminder:
character.botc-mc.villageidiot.ability: Ev'ry moon, pick a matey: ye be told their loyalty. [+0 to +2 Fools o' the Fleet. 1 o' the extras be tipsy]
character.botc-mc.villageidiot.first: Pick a Fool o' the Fleet to be tipsy. Rouse the Fools o' the Fleet one by one. They pick a matey, tell 'em either 'good'un' or 'bad'un' based off that matey's loyalty.
character.botc-mc.villageidiot.flavor: Brits be blue, the French be red. Please reverse what I just said.
character.botc-mc.villageidiot.name: Fool o' the Fleet
character.botc-mc.villageidiot.other: Rouse the Fools o' the Fleet one by one. They pick a matey, tell 'em either 'good'un' or 'bad'un' based off that matey's loyalty.
character.botc-mc.virgin.ability: The first time ye be accused, if'n the accuser be a Crewmate, they be sent to the locker sharp-like.
character.botc-mc.virgin.flavor: I be pure. Let those who be without sin cast themselves down and suffer in my stead. My reputation shall not be stained with yer venomous accusations.
character.botc-mc.virgin.name: Damsel
character.botc-mc.vizier.ability: All mateys know ye be the Governor. Ye can't join the locker in daylight. If a good'un said aye, ye can make 'em walk the plaink sharp-like.
character.botc-mc.vizier.first: Proclaim who the Governor matey be.
character.botc-mc.vizier.flavor: Thou art convicted of piracy, a trade thou hast followed with most industrious wickedness, preying upon honest men, vexing the seas, and mocking mercy as though it were a jest. The law, which hath long borne thy insolence, now calls for its due, and therefore, in His Majesty’s name, thou art condemned to be hanged by the neck until dead. May God grant thee more patience than this bench doth.
character.botc-mc.vizier.name: Governor
character.botc-mc.vortox.ability: Ev'ry Moon*, pick a matey, they join the locker. Crewmate occupations yield scurvy. Each Sun, if'n no matey’s walk the plank, bad’uns prevail.
character.botc-mc.vortox.flavor: Ye think ye rule the waves? I be the wind, the black water, and the breaker of bones. All that floats, all that breathes, be mine tonight.
character.botc-mc.vortox.name: Great Storm
character.botc-mc.vortox.other: The Great Storm picks a matey. :reminder:
character.botc-mc.voudon.ability: Just ye and those in the locker can say aye. They don't need their dead man's treasure to do so. Ye don't need half the crew to concur.
character.botc-mc.voudon.flavor: The dead speak, and I hear them. Cross not the tide tonight, or ye’ll answer to their wrath.
character.botc-mc.voudon.name: Spirit-Caller
character.botc-mc.washerwoman.ability: Ye join knowin' that one o' two mateys be a particular Crewmate.
character.botc-mc.washerwoman.first: Show the Crewmate station mark. Point at both the *CREWMATE* and *WRONG* mateys.
character.botc-mc.washerwoman.flavor: We got Johnny on watch tonight. Or was it Jonny? My records got mixed up in the wind.
character.botc-mc.washerwoman.name: Chronicler
character.botc-mc.widow.ability: Under yer first moon, look at the map and pick a matey: they be seasick. A good'un knows ye be aboard.
character.botc-mc.widow.first: Show the map for as long as the Widow needs. The Widow picks a matey. :reminder:
character.botc-mc.widow.flavor: "Will you walk into my parlour?" said a spider to a fly, "'Tis the prettiest little parlour that ever did you spy."
character.botc-mc.widow.name: Widow
character.botc-mc.witch.ability: Ev'ry moon, pick a matey: if'n they accuse in the morrow, they join the locker. If there be just 3 mateys livin', ye stop workin' this trade.
character.botc-mc.witch.flavor: Three drops of goat's blood. A lock of hair, torn in anger. The name is spoken, the shadow cast. Walk left foot first down that brambled path, and don't look back.
character.botc-mc.witch.name: Voodoo Master
character.botc-mc.wizard.ability: Once on yer journey, ye can make a wish. If'n it comes try, it mayhap has a cost, and leaves a clue to its self.
character.botc-mc.wizard.first: Work the Wizard's trade, if needs be.
character.botc-mc.wizard.flavor: Every man and every woman is a star. Love is the law, love under will.
character.botc-mc.wizard.name: Wizard
character.botc-mc.wizard.other: Work the Wizard's trade, if needs be.
character.botc-mc.wraith.ability: Ye can keep yer peepers open under the moon. Ye rouse with other bad'uns.
character.botc-mc.wraith.first: Rouse the Wraith if other bad'uns be roused.
character.botc-mc.wraith.flavor: Ra'āb ina pān ṣilli ša dāri. Rigim qallu ina šūri, šītu ša šunātīka iredde, u napšutka idlul ina pān maṣṣartī dāriti.
character.botc-mc.wraith.name: Wraith
character.botc-mc.wraith.other: Rouse the Wraith if other bad'uns be roused.
character.botc-mc.xaan.ability: Under the Xth moon, all Crewmates be seasick until sun down. [X Stowaways]
character.botc-mc.xaan.first: Mark the Xaan with the *FIRST MOON* mark. If X be 1, mark the Xaan with the *X* memberin' mark. :reminder: :reminder:
character.botc-mc.xaan.flavor: Down ye fall. One by one. By two, by three, by five.
character.botc-mc.xaan.name: Xaan
character.botc-mc.xaan.other: Change the Xaan memberin' mark to the right moon. If it be the Xth moon, mark the Xaan wi' the *X* memberin' mark. :reminder: :reminder:
character.botc-mc.yaggababble.ability: Ye join knowin' a secret phrase. Every time ye said it on deck under the most recent daylight, a matey mayhaps joins the locker.
character.botc-mc.yaggababble.first: Pick a secret phrase. Rouse the Gorgon o' the Gab and tell 'em what it be.
character.botc-mc.yaggababble.flavor: Murders inside the Rue Morgue? Фальшивые новости! Hounds on the Baskerville moor? Фальшивые новости! Death while sailing the Nile? Фальшивые новости!
character.botc-mc.yaggababble.name: Ghoul o' the Gab
character.botc-mc.yaggababble.other: For ev'ry time the Ghoul o' the Gab gabbed last daylight, ye can pick a matey. They join the locker. :reminder:
character.botc-mc.zealot.ability: If'n there be 5 or more mateys livin', ye have to say aye for ev'ry accusal.
character.botc-mc.zealot.flavor: I like talkin' to ye. Ye got wits about ye. Not necessarily yer own, but it be the thought that counts.
character.botc-mc.zealot.name: God-Botherer
character.botc-mc.zenomancer.ability: Some'n, or some'ns, have a task. If'n they do it, that matey be told some right knowin's.
character.botc-mc.zenomancer.flavor: Hands, to the guns, man the sail! Unfurl main sail! Ready... fire! Hard to port! Y'arr, brace, brace! Boarders, get yer cutlasses, we be takin' a prize tonight!
character.botc-mc.zenomancer.name: Taskmaster
character.botc-mc.zombuul.ability: Ev'ry moon*, if none joined the locker under last daylight, pick a matey: they join the locker. The first time ye join the locker, ye be livin', but pass for in the locker.
character.botc-mc.zombuul.flavor: I do not. Understand. Your ways. Fellow human. Show me. The sea. Where the holy. Swim. With the fishes. I yearn. To swim. Too.
character.botc-mc.zombuul.name: Revenant
character.botc-mc.zombuul.other: If'n no one joined the locker under last daylight, the Revanant picks a matey. :reminder:
reminder.botc-mc.2nd: This be a memberin' mark for the Siren, for the "2nd" matey that they picked.
reminder.botc-mc.isthedemon: Be The Beast o' the Sea
